_doc: Maintainer corrections for the faction-starters convert step (Brief 166, `npm run import:faction-starters`). `overrides` is keyed by the VERBATIM source title as it appears in Warhammer_OFOC_SSOT.xlsx (case-insensitive, trimmed). Value = a book slug to force-link (click target /buch/{slug}), or "" to mark a title as intentionally unlinked (suppresses it from faction-starters.review.md). Applied BEFORE fuzzy resolution; re-run-stable and reviewable in the diff. A non-empty slug must exist in book-roster.json or the convert step fails loud. Misses left out of this file stay in the review list as DB-Nachpflege candidates. `labelOverrides` is keyed by the VERBATIM faction/subfaction label (case-insensitive, trimmed) → corrected DISPLAY label; it fixes source spelling (e.g. "Nekrons" → "Necrons") and feeds the slug, so a corrected label also cleans the URL. Display-only: it never changes which Excel rows match.
